description: Bounded public SDTK site audit with an owner review gate.

human_gate.prompt: Owner reviews the public-site audit findings before closing the run.

cleanup_policy: Capture canonical evidence first, then archive only the disposable Kanban card created for this run.
evidence_expectations: Each finding includes URL, section or heading, concise evidence, severity, and recommended correction.
No credential, cookie, token, or login-required content in evidence.
